challenges.title: 将来打算: be going to

questions.prompt: 选择正确的选项填空，完成句子：I ______ going to study English.
questions.explanation: 动词'be going to'结构中，'be'要根据主语进行变位。当主语是'I'时，使用'am'。
questions.hint: 记住'be'动词的变位规则。

questions.prompt: 下列哪句话表达了将来的计划？
options: I will study history right now.
questions.explanation: 'be going to'用于表达未来已经确定的计划或打算。'I study history'是现在习惯，'I studied history'是过去发生，'I will study history right now'是即刻的决定。
questions.hint: 哪个词组表示“打算做某事”？

questions.prompt: Lingling ______ to leave primary school soon.
questions.explanation: 主语'Lingling'是第三人称单数，所以'be'动词应使用'is'。
questions.hint: 主语是单数还是复数？

questions.prompt: 当你想询问别人的未来计划时，应该使用哪个句型？
options: What are you going to study?
questions.explanation: 'What are you going to study?'用于询问未来的计划或打算。其他选项分别询问现在、过去或即刻的动作。
questions.hint: 回忆一下'be going to'的疑问句形式。

questions.prompt: 选择正确的疑问句形式：
options: You are going to middle school?
Are you going to middle school?
Do you going to middle school?
questions.explanation: 'be going to'的疑问句是将'be'动词提前到主语之前，形成'Be + 主语 + going to + 动词原形?'。
questions.hint: 疑问句通常需要倒装主谓。

questions.prompt: A: Are you going to study Chemistry? B: Yes, ______.
questions.explanation: 以'Are you going to...?'提问时，肯定回答通常是'Yes, I am.'。
questions.hint: 看问题的'be'动词形式。

questions.prompt: 短语'be going to'主要用来表达什么？
questions.explanation: 'be going to'主要用于表达事先计划好的未来行动，或根据现有证据做出的未来预测。
questions.hint: 这个词组的意思是“打算做……”或“即将做……”。

questions.prompt: 补全句子：We are not ______ to study French.
questions.explanation: 否定句形式为'be + not + going to + 动词原形'。
questions.hint: 否定句中'not'的位置。

questions.prompt: 下列哪句话与'Amy is going to study Geography.'意思最接近？
options: Amy plans to study Geography in the future.
Amy wants to study Geography now.
questions.explanation: 'be going to'表示未来的计划，所以'Amy plans to study Geography in the future.'是意思最接近的。
questions.hint: 思考'be going to'表示的时间和意图。

questions.prompt: 根据课文，Lingling和Amy将要学习哪些科目？Amy's going to study History, Science, Geography and French. Lingling is going to study Physics, Chemistry and Chinese. Lingling also going to study History and Geography. But she's not going to study French.
options: They are going to study the same subjects.
They are going to study different subjects.
They are going to study only History and Geography.
They are going to study only French.
questions.explanation: 根据课文，Amy学习History, Science, Geography和French，而Lingling学习Physics, Chemistry, Chinese, History和Geography。她们有共同的科目，但也有各自不同的科目，所以她们将学习不同的科目。
questions.hint: 仔细比较她们各自的科目列表。

challenges.title: 时间到了: It's time to...

questions.prompt: 选择正确的选项填空：It's time ______ say goodbye.
questions.explanation: 短语'It's time to'后面直接跟动词原形，表示“是时候做某事了”。
questions.hint: 这个短语的固定搭配是什么？

questions.prompt: 当你想要表达“该吃饭了”的时候，你会怎么说？
questions.explanation: 'It's time to'后面必须跟动词原形，'eat'是动词原形。
questions.hint: 动词原形前需要加什么？

questions.prompt: 短语'It's time to...'的主要目的是什么？
options: 表达现在正在进行的动作
表示是时候或应该做某事了
questions.explanation: 'It's time to...'用于提示或宣告某个动作的合适时机已经到来。
questions.hint: 这个短语直译过来就是“是时候……”。

questions.prompt: 'It's time to start anew.'这句话的意思是：
options: 现在可以开始新的事物了。
questions.explanation: 'It's time to start anew.'表示“现在是开始新事物的恰当时机”或“是时候重新开始了”。
questions.hint: 'anew'是“重新”的意思。

questions.prompt: 下列哪句话使用了'It's time to...'的正确结构？
questions.explanation: 正确的结构是'It's time to + 动词原形'。'It's'是'It is'的缩写，不是物主代词'Its'。
questions.hint: 注意'It's'和'Its'的区别。

questions.prompt: 根据课文，小学快结束了，该做什么了？School is nearly finished. It's time to start anew. It's time to say goodbye now.
options: It's time to say goodbye and start anew.
questions.explanation: 课文中明确提到'It's time to start anew.'和'It's time to say goodbye now.'
questions.hint: 答案在提供的文本中直接可以找到。

questions.prompt: 选择正确的单词来完成句子：It's time to ______ your homework.
questions.explanation: 'It's time to'后面必须跟动词原形。'do'是动词原形。
questions.hint: 动词原形是什么？

questions.prompt: A: It's getting late. B: Yes, it's time to ______.
questions.explanation: 'It's time to'后接动词原形，所以是'go home'。
questions.hint: 注意'to'后面跟什么形式的动词。

questions.prompt: 下列哪句话与'It's time for lunch.'结构不同，但意思相似？
questions.explanation: 'It's time for + 名词'和'It's time to + 动词原形'都可以表达“该做某事了”。'to have lunch'是正确的动词短语形式。
questions.hint: 'for'后面跟名词，'to'后面跟动词原形。

questions.prompt: 现在已经很晚了，你对朋友说：
options: It's time to go to bed.
It's time for go to bed.
It time to go to bed.
questions.explanation: 'It's time to + 动词原形'是正确表达“该做某事了”的句型。
questions.hint: 固定句型'It's time to do something'。
